hooks.command: TOKEN=$(cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.memory/daemon.token" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); curl -s -X POST   -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"   -H "Content-Type: application/json"   --data-binary @-   "http://127.0.0.1:37222/hooks/session-start"   2>/dev/null || true

TOKEN=$(cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.memory/daemon.token" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); curl -s -X POST   -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"   -H "Content-Type: application/json"   --data-binary @-   "http://127.0.0.1:37222/hooks/prompt-context"   2>/dev/null || true
